data.title: Omega Healthcare Investors, Inc. declared $0.67/share dividend, payable on August 15, 2025 to stockholders of record on August 4.
data.description: Omega Healthcare Investors, Inc. declared a cash dividend of $0.67 per share on common stock. The dividend will be payable on August 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of August 4, 2025. Omega focuses on long-term healthcare investments, particularly in skilled nursing and assisted living facilities. It is a real estate investment trust listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol OHI.

data.title: Analyst predicts bearish August for Bitcoin, which may lead to altcoins hitting fresh lows. Bitcoin dominance at 60% in October 2024, but altcoins still traded 27%-28% above historical range lows.
data.description: Crypto analyst Benjamin Cowen is predicting a bearish outlook for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in August, potentially leading to decreased values for altcoins. During a podcast on July 21, Cowen pointed out that altcoins are currently overvalued compared to BTC, based on his unique indicator "Total3 minus USDT divided by Bitcoin," indicating a possible downturn for altcoins. Cowen mentioned that even when Bitcoin dominance reached 60% in October 2024, altcoins were still trading 27%-28% higher than their historical lows. This discrepancy puzzled Cowen, suggesting that altcoins may experience a drop in value. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Chicago Gourmet 2025 powered by Invesco QQQ features a sports-themed culinary lineup, tickets on sale July 25.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, the renowned Chicago Gourmet event, supported by Invesco QQQ, is back with an exciting sports-themed culinary program. Tickets for the event will be available for purchase starting on the same day. Invesco QQQ has taken on the role of the title sponsor, showcasing its commitment to innovation in collaboration with the Illinois Restaurant Association and a host of other partners.

data.title: JAKKS Pacific introduces new toys at San Diego Comic-Con 2025: SUPER MARIO, THE SIMPSONS, DC X SONIC THE HEDGEHOG, BENDY, DOG MAN.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Santa Monica, California, JAKKS Pacific, Inc. (NASDAQ: JAKK) revealed a new lineup at San Diego Comic-Con. The lineup draws inspiration from famous franchises such as Super Mario, The Simpsons, DC x Sonic the Hedgehog, Bendy, and Dog Man.
